initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(Patient.ID) AS underage_count
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Examination Date BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '1993-12-31'
  AND (strftime('%Y', Examination.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) < 18;

SELECT COUNT(Patient.ID) AS underage_count
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Examination Date BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '1993-12-31'
  AND (strftime('%Y', Examination.Examination Date) - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) < 18;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT COUNT(Patient.ID) AS underage_count
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.`Examination Date` BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '1993-12-31'
  AND (strftime('%Y', Examination.`Examination Date`) - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) < 18;
